Class Executive

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--Employee
        |
        +--Manager
              |
              +--Executive
public class Executive
extends Manager

Executive class which is derived from the Manager class. The difference is that Executive has a Health Plan and Stock Options.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
Jamie's Page

Constructor Detail

Executive

public Executive(java.lang.String n,
                 double s,
                 int year,
                 int month,
                 int day,
                 java.lang.String hp,
                 int so)
Parameters:
n - the executive's name
s - the salary
year - the hire year
month - the hire month
day - the hire day
hp - the health plan
so - the stock options
